requirement_topic.en: SI / IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence - SII Mandatory-Standard Gate
requirement_topic.zh: SI / IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全证据——SII强制标准门槛
requirement_topic.zht: SI / IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全證據——SII強制標準門檻

summary.en: SII is Israel's national standards body and operates testing, certification, and importer services for products subject to Israeli Standards and mandatory-standard controls. For PV inverters, the core safety evidence should be mapped to the current Israeli Standard adoption or reference for IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2. SII or the importer should confirm whether the inverter is regulated as an imported electrical product requiring SII conformity review, whether foreign CB/IEC reports can be recognized, and whether additional model, label, instruction, or Hebrew documentation checks apply.
summary.zh: SII是以色列国家标准机构，并为受以色列标准和强制标准管制的产品提供测试、认证和进口商服务。对于光伏逆变器，核心安全证据应映射至现行以色列标准对IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的采纳或引用。SII或进口商应确认逆变器是否作为进口电气产品受到监管并需要SII合格评定、境外CB/IEC报告是否可被承认，以及是否适用额外型号、标签、说明书或希伯来语文件检查。
summary.zht: SII是以色列國家標準機構，並為受以色列標準和強制標準管制的產品提供測試、認證和進口商服務。對於光伏逆變器，核心安全證據應映射至現行以色列標準對IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的採納或引用。SII或進口商應確認逆變器是否作為進口電氣產品受到監管並需要SII合格評定、境外CB/IEC報告是否可被承認，以及是否適用額外型號、標籤、說明書或希伯來語文件檢查。

standards_or_laws: Current Israeli Standard route for PV inverter safety - confirm SI adoption or reference before import
IEC 62109-1 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SII importer testing and certification process for goods subject to Israeli Standards

summary.en: China-side inverter safety files commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC/CGC certification, and CNAS laboratory reports. These documents may show China domestic design and testing history, but they are not Israel/SII approval evidence and should not be presented as a substitute for SI / IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence or SII import-release documentation.
summary.zh: 中国侧逆变器安全文件通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC/CGC认证和CNAS实验室报告。这些文件可显示中国国内设计和测试历史，但不是以色列/SII批准证据，不应作为SI / IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据或SII进口放行文件的替代。
summary.zht: 中國側逆變器安全文件通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC/CGC認證和CNAS實驗室報告。這些文件可顯示中國國內設計和測試歷史，但不是以色列/SII批准證據，不應作為SI / IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據或SII進口放行文件的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T or NB/T safety file does not establish compliance with SII's current Israeli Standard route. Exporters should compile IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and test reports covering the specific model or model family, bill of materials and critical components, ratings, firmware and hardware revisions, installation instructions, markings, and importer documentation. Before shipment, confirm with SII whether the product is under a mandatory standard, which import group or release route applies, and whether supplementary testing in Israel is required.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国GB/T或NB/T安全文件不能证明符合SII现行以色列标准路径。出口商应汇编覆盖特定型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2证书和测试报告、物料清单及关键部件、额定值、固件和硬件版本、安装说明、标识及进口商文件。出货前，应向SII确认产品是否属于强制标准范围、适用哪个进口组别或放行路径，以及是否需要在以色列补充测试。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國GB/T或NB/T安全文件不能證明符合SII現行以色列標準路徑。出口商應彙編覆蓋特定型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2證書和測試報告、物料清單及關鍵部件、額定值、韌體和硬體版本、安裝說明、標識及進口商文件。出貨前，應向SII確認產品是否屬於強制標準範圍、適用哪個進口組別或放行路徑，以及是否需要在以色列補充測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter falls under an applicable mandatory Israeli Standard or SII import-release route; also commonly required by project owners and connection reviewers for grid-connected PV projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 are China-side baseline evidence and are not accepted as Israel/SII safety approval evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Plan for SII route confirmation and SI / IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence before importing a China-made PV inverter into Israel. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, CQC, CGC, or CNAS files can support technical background but should not be represented as Israel/SII approval. Confirm mandatory-standard scope, report-recognition options, label and Hebrew-documentation requirements directly with SII or the appointed Israel importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国制造光伏逆变器进口以色列前，应先安排SII路径确认及SI / IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC、CGC或CNAS文件可作为技术背景支持，但不得表述为以色列/SII批准。请直接向SII或指定以色列进口商确认强制标准范围、报告承认选项、标签和希伯来语文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國製造光伏逆變器進口以色列前，應先安排SII路徑確認及SI / IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、CQC、CGC或CNAS文件可作為技術背景支持，但不得表述為以色列/SII批准。請直接向SII或指定以色列進口商確認強制標準範圍、報告承認選項、標籤和希伯來語文件要求。
